# Quaternius Horse Model

File: `quaternius-horse.glb`

Source: https://poly.pizza/m/qvTrSG9pZF

Direct asset URL used during import: https://static.poly.pizza/d37dbc87-ca61-4b2c-a2da-d2f0c4240bef.glb

Author: Quaternius

License: Creative Commons Zero 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0)

Notes: The model is a low-poly rigged horse with skeletal animation clips including `Gallop`, `Gallop_Jump`, `Eating`, `Walk`, and idle/reaction animations. It is loaded from `public/assets` at runtime so it is not bundled into the Vite JavaScript chunk.
